name: Sundiro Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Sundiro Holding Co., Ltd. operates in the coal industry in China. The company is involved in coal mining; and manufacturing and sale of raw and lump coal products, as well as long flame coal for power generation, boiler, chemical, and civil uses. It also produces and sells motorcycles and export vehicles, as well as regular models, scooters, cub-type models, and electric bicycles. In addition, the company offers standard, basic, and advanced electric vehicles; coal chemical products; and proprietary, international freight forwarder, and cold-chain logistic services, as well as contract logistics services, including designing, packaging, VMI, transportation, and distribution services in various areas, such as vehicle parts, industrial cabinets, and electromechanical and electrical appliances. Further, it manufactures aircraft parts and yachts; and engages in the real estate project planning, investment, operating consultancy, and agency business, as well as provides tourism services. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
